import { createClient } from 'db-vendo-client'
import { withRetrying } from 'db-vendo-client/retry.js'
import { profile as dbnavProfile } from 'db-vendo-client/p/dbnav/index.js'

const locs = await client.locations\('Bonn Hbf', { results: 3, stops: true, addresses: false, poi: false }\)
console.log\('stations:', JSON.stringify\(locs.slice\(0,3\).map\(l => \({ name: l.name, id: l.id }\)\)\)\)
EOF)
